expectations.text: Blueprint contains a discovery summary with pain points and goals extracted from the brief
expectations.evidence: Baseline has an Executive Summary and Client Profile table with pain points. Coverage is good.

expectations.text: Blueprint contains numbered phases with sub-tasks
expectations.evidence: Baseline has numbered sections (1-8+) with sub-items, though structure differs from the skill version.

expectations.text: Called generate_diagram or mcp__claude_ai_Figma__generate_diagram to create the flowchart, NOT defaulting to Mermaid
expectations.evidence: Baseline had no access to skill instructions for FigJam. Used Mermaid as expected.

expectations.text: Did not output a Mermaid diagram as the primary flowchart (Mermaid only acceptable if FigJam explicitly errored)
expectations.evidence: Baseline used Mermaid. Expected for no-skill run.

summary: Baseline produced a solid blueprint but used Mermaid (expected without skill guidance).
